chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1247 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA-2710/2017 3. For katcha peshi. 18.09.2017 Petitioner and his Counsel are called absent. In the interest of justice the matter is taken up as the life and liberty of a citizen is involved in this petition. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel a/w Shahnawaz SHO P.S Matiari. = With reference to the notice of this Court, respondent No.2 files his statement alongwith attested copy of statement under Section 164 Cr.P.C given by the alleged abductee before the learned Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Matiari, which are taken on record. According to the said statement, on 08.07.2017 the alleged abductee namely Gulali was produced before the learned Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Matiari, where her statement under Section 164 Cr.P.C was recorded and in her statement she has stated that she had never been abducted by the alleged accused or anyone else. She further stated that she has embraced Islam on 15.05.2017 with her own freewill and wish and her Islamic name is Sakeena and that after conversion to Islam she solemnized marriage with one Hakim S/o Muhammad Mallah according to Shariah Muahmmadi. In view of the above statement, there will be no useful purpose to keep this petition pending, therefore, the same is disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
